name: IP_Address::MatchesAddress
title: IP_Address::MatchesAddress
description: Compares two addresses whereas wildcards matches always. If no address type is set or the address is set to 0.0.0.0 (IPv4) or ::0 (IPv6) this is considered as wildcard.
With form 2 only the network address of the IP address will be considered.

parameters.name: ipAddr
parameters.description: An IP_Address object which may contain wildcards.
